name: James Litinsky
background: Mr. Litinsky is the Founder, Chairman and Chief Executive Officer of MP Materials. He is also the Founder and Chief Investment Officer of JHL Capital Group LLC. Before founding JHL Capital Group in 2006, he was a member of the investment team at Fortress Investment Group. He began his career at Omni-Offices. Mr. Litinsky serves on the boards of several organizations, including the Museum of Contemporary Art Chicago and the Shirley Ryan AbilityLab.

company_affiliations.name: MP Materials Corp.
company_affiliations.title_or_role: Founder, Chairman, and Chief Executive Officer
